-= Bar =-

There is an unguarded exit to the south.

-= Bar =-0/9

-= Basement =-
You are in a basement. An ordinary one. You begin to take stock of what's here.

You hear a noise behind you and spin around, but you can't see anything other than a case. The case contains a TextWorld limited edition latchkey. You idly wonder how they came up with the name TextWorld for this place. It's pretty fitting.

There is a closed gateway leading south. There is an open door leading east. You don't like doors? Why not try going north, that entranceway is unblocked.

-= Basement =-0/15

-= Bedroom =-
Of every bedroom you could have sauntered into, you had to come round an ordinary one.

You can see a TextWorld limited edition chest.

There is an open door leading west. You don't like doors? Why not try going north, that entranceway is unguarded.


-= Bedroom =-0/16

-= Sauna =-
Look at you, bigshot, walking into a sauna like it isn't some huge deal. Okay, just remember what you're here to do, and everything will go great.



There is an exit to the south. Don't worry, it is unguarded.
